codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, commit fd3c6ff, transcript skeleton, and touched runtime/test files. The implementation now classifies non-2xx startup prewarm responses as `failed`, preserves `timeout` only for real budget exhaustion, records the new outcome in runtime state and Prometheus metrics, and continues prewarming later targets after handler failures. Added app-level characterization covers both direct loop behavior and surfaced diagnostics/metrics evidence.

summary: Pass. The prewarm loop and surfaced diagnostics/metrics now distinguish handler failures from true budget timeouts, and later declared targets continue after non-timeout failures as required. No blocking or non-blocking issues found in the reviewed scope.
